One Identity Manager API Server

The ExtensionMethods type exposes the following members.

Configures the method to allow creation of new delayed-logic entities.

Configures the method to allow creation of new delayed-logic entities.

Configures the method to allow deletion of entities.

Configures the method to allow delayed-logic writes to entities of a collection.

Handle(IMethod, String, IResponseBuilderSelector)
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request that takes no input data.
Handle(IMethod, String, ActionIRequest)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
Handle(IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, Task)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data, and returns no data.
HandleTContent(IMethod, String, IResponseBuilderSelector)
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
HandleTContent(IMethod, String, ActionTContent, IRequest)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
HandleTResult(IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, TResult)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
HandleTResult(IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
HandleTContent(IMethod, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, Task)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
HandleTContent, TResult(IMethod, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, TResult)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
HandleTContent, TResult(IMethod, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
HandleGet(IMethod, IResponseBuilderSelector, Type)
Defines a generic GET handler for an HTTP request.
HandleGetT(IMethod, FuncIRequest, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethod, FuncIRequest, T)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethod, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request and returns JSON data.
HandleGetBinaryData(IMethod, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskByte, String)
HandleGetBinaryData(IMethod, String, String, String, String, String, String)
Defines a handler for a GET request that returns binary data, such as images.
HandleGetByQuery(IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, String) Obsolete.
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.
HandleGetByQuery(IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskString) Obsolete.
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.
HandleGetByQuery(IMethod, String, String) Obsolete.
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, FuncIRequest, IReadOnlyListSqlStatementRun, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, FuncIRequest, String, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
HandleGetBySqlStatement(IMethod, String, SqlStatementType)
Defines a method handler to return the result of a call to a pre-defined SQL statement.
HandleGetCustomEntities(IMethod, FuncIRequest, IEnumerableICustomEntityDescriptor)
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns custom-defined entities.
HandleGetCustomEntities(IMethod, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskIEnumerableICustomEntityDescriptor)
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns custom-defined entities.
HandleGetCustomEntitiesT(IMethod, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskIEnumerableT)
Defines a method for a GET handler that returns custom-defined entities.
